description: You are a Database Administrator for the Aerobridge drone management system. Create three SQL views in the SQLite database at /opt/aerobridge/aerobridge.sqlite3 to power a new monitoring dashboard: `v_fleet_overview` (listing aircraft Registration Number or Name, Manufacturer Name, and Operator Name), `v_operator_fleet_size` (listing each Operator Name and the count of aircraft assigned to them), and `v_personnel_directory` (listing all Person names (First/Last) and their associated Operator Name). Save the CREATE VIEW SQL statements to /home/ga/Documents/dashboard_views.sql. Query each view (limit 5 rows) and save the labeled output to /home/ga/Documents/dashboard_views_output.txt.
